query:
SELECT 
  id,
  bucket_name,
  bucket_type,
  quota_gb,
  current_usage_gb,
  overage_gb,
  alert_threshold_pct,
  notification_email,
  updated_at,
  created_at
FROM vocus_buckets
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
